field.name: note
field.p: Spec: see attached PDF (artwork, dimensions, Pantone codes, packaging).
Production: standard lead time 35 days from artwork sign-off and 50% deposit receipt; first sample within 7 days for client approval before mass production.
Sample fee: deductible from final balance on order confirmation.
Quantity / Unit Price: TBC by RFQ pending sourcing — final price locks when this quotation is issued as a PI.
Incoterm: DAP — Hong Kong unless otherwise specified.
Payment Terms: 50% deposit on order confirmation · balance before shipment (B/L copy).
Validity: 14 days from issue date.

field.name: note
field.p: Reorder of: PI No. [paste prior PI No. here, e.g. PI-XX-58-26-001] — spec, artwork, and packaging unchanged unless explicitly noted below.
Lead time: Faster than first run because tooling/artwork is approved; 21 days standard from deposit receipt.
Pricing: Same as prior PI unless raw-material / freight delta is documented.
Payment Terms: 50% deposit on order confirmation · balance before shipment.
Validity: 7 days from issue date.

field.name: note

p.b: Sample only — no production volume committed.

field.p: Sample fee: Non-refundable on standalone sample orders. Deductible from the final balance if a production order is confirmed within 60 days of sample delivery.
Lead time: 7–14 days from artwork sign-off (varies by factory).
Shipping: Express courier (DHL / FedEx) at customer's account unless stated.
Payment Terms: 100% prepayment of sample fee.
Validity: 30 days from issue date.

field.name: note
field.p: Strategic Pricing — GM approved [internal ref: insert GM-approval reference / activity link].

Important — not a precedent: Margin on this quotation is outside Courtwell's standard band and was cleared by the General Manager for this specific transaction. Future quotations to this client revert to standard pricing.
Signature required on the proforma to lock the agreed price.
Validity: 7 days from issue date — strategic windows are short.
Payment Terms: 50% deposit on order confirmation · balance before shipment.
